questions.prompt: A customer wants to host their new domain ablebookkeeping.example in their existing ApisCP account. The right surface is:
questions.explanation: Addon Domains is for a different registered domain in the same account. Subdomains is for names beneath an existing domain. A new Nexus account would create a separate billing/storage envelope, which isn't what the customer asked for.

questions.prompt: ApisCP's 1-click WordPress installer will write into a document root that already contains a placeholder index.html.
questions.explanation: The destination must be empty. The customer's placeholder file blocks the install. Move or delete it first via Files > File Manager, then run the install.
